description: CompositionWoven green kurta made of 100% cotton, has golden print, three-quarter sleeves, round slit neck, tape and panel border on the sleeve hems, panel with stitch detailing and tape border that extends from the neckline till the upper bust, and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis piece of art by aurelia is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
